title: Thai Smoky Pilaf
description: A flavorful Thai-inspired pilaf dish with smoky flavors. Perfect for a quick and easy meal.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of ghee in a pan over medium heat.
Add 1 tsp of smoky paprika and sauté for 1 minute.
Add 1 cup of roasted rice and stir to coat with the spice mixture.
Pour in 2 cups of vegetable broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15-20 minutes.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
